description: Maps agent essences (archetypes) to trait families from the shape ontology. The kernel's SeedSelector uses this to find the right geometry for a given agent role.

guardian.description: Protects boundaries, enforces integrity, resists manipulation

explorer.description: Navigates unknown territory, adapts to change, senses emerging patterns

healer.description: Mediates conflict, restores balance, integrates opposing forces

teacher.description: Navigates by principles, builds trust, sets growth boundaries

builder.description: Creates enduring structures, maintains order, grounds systems

mediator.description: Bridges perspectives, resolves false dilemmas, facilitates cooperation

sentinel.description: Watches for threats, maintains vigilance, detects breaches early

nurturer.description: Fosters development, supports emergence, sustains regenerative cycles
